title: Bee Removal in Kew Gardens Hills, Queens | $350 – $550
metaDescription: Professional bee removal services in Kew Gardens Hills, Queens. Safe, humane extraction by licensed experts. Serving residential and commercial properties. Call now for fast service!
intro: Dealing with a bee infestation in Kew Gardens Hills? Best Pest Control NYC provides safe, professional bee removal services for homeowners and businesses throughout this vibrant Queens neighborhood. Our licensed technicians specialize in humane bee extraction and colony relocation, protecting both your property and these important pollinators.
whyUs: With over 15 years serving Kew Gardens Hills and surrounding Queens neighborhoods, we understand the unique challenges of bee infestations in both single-family homes and multi-unit buildings. Our team responds quickly, uses eco-friendly methods, and guarantees complete removal with transparent pricing from $350 to $550.
localContext: Kew Gardens Hills' tree-lined streets, proximity to parks like Flushing Meadows Corona Park, and mix of Tudor-style homes and garden apartments create ideal nesting conditions for bees, particularly in attics, wall voids, and under eaves. The neighborhood's mature landscaping and flowering gardens attract bee colonies seeking shelter near the bustling Queens College campus and Main Street shopping corridor.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to bee removal calls in Kew Gardens Hills?
faqs.answer: We typically respond to Kew Gardens Hills service calls within 2-4 hours during business hours and offer same-day or next-day appointments. For emergency situations involving large swarms or allergic residents, we prioritize immediate dispatch to ensure your safety.

faqs.question: What's included in the $350 – $550 bee removal service?
faqs.answer: Our bee removal service includes a thorough inspection, safe colony extraction, removal of accessible honeycomb and hive material, treatment of the affected area to prevent re-infestation, and proper sealing of entry points. The final price depends on hive location, size, and accessibility.

faqs.question: Do you relocate bees or exterminate them?
faqs.answer: Whenever possible, we prioritize humane bee relocation over extermination. Our experienced technicians safely capture and transport honeybee colonies to local beekeepers and apiaries. We only recommend extermination for aggressive Africanized bees or when relocation isn't feasible due to safety concerns.

faqs.question: Can bees return after removal in Kew Gardens Hills homes?
faqs.answer: Once we remove a colony and properly seal entry points, the likelihood of bees returning to the same location is minimal. We also remove pheromone traces and recommend removing attractants like exposed food sources. Our service includes a 30-day guarantee against re-infestation at the treated site.
